Name: Password Spraying
Description: Attempts a small number of common passwords against many accounts

Name: Password Guessing
Description: Attempts many passwords against a single account

Name: Valid Accounts
Description: Uses legitimate credentials for persistence and access

Name: Exploit Public Facing Application
Description: Exploits vulnerabilities in public facing applications

Name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
Description: Uses command shells or scripts to execute malicious code

Name: Remote Services
Description: Uses remote services such as RDP SSH or SMB for movement

Name: Network Service Discovery
Description: Scans network services and open ports

Name: Phishing
Description: Uses phishing emails or messages to gain access

Name: Credentials from Password Stores
Description: Steals credentials from browsers or password stores

Name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
Description: Bypasses security controls to elevate privileges
